auth.label: Personal access token
auth.description: GitHub personal access token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Fine-grained tokens are recommended.

actions.name: add_issue_assignees
actions.description: Add assignees to a GitHub issue.

actions.name: add_issue_labels
actions.description: Add labels to a GitHub issue.

actions.name: check_pull_request_merged
actions.description: Check whether a GitHub pull request has been merged.

actions.name: clear_issue_labels
actions.description: Remove all labels from a GitHub issue.

actions.name: compare_commits
actions.description: Compare two commit references in a GitHub repository.

actions.name: create_commit_status
actions.description: Create a commit status for a GitHub commit SHA.

actions.name: create_issue
actions.description: Create an issue in a GitHub repository.

actions.name: create_issue_comment
actions.description: Create a comment on a GitHub issue.

actions.name: create_label
actions.description: Create a label in a GitHub repository.

actions.name: create_or_update_file
actions.description: Create or update a repository file through the GitHub contents API. Writing under .github/workflows may require GitHub workflow scope.

actions.name: create_pull_request
actions.description: Create a pull request in a GitHub repository.

actions.name: create_pull_request_review
actions.description: Create a review for a GitHub pull request, optionally with inline comments.

actions.name: create_pull_request_review_comment
actions.description: Create a review comment on a GitHub pull request diff.

actions.name: create_ref
actions.description: Create a Git reference in a GitHub repository.

actions.name: create_release
actions.description: Create a release in a GitHub repository.

actions.name: create_repository
actions.description: Create a repository for the authenticated GitHub user.

actions.name: delete_file
actions.description: Delete a repository file through the GitHub contents API. Deleting under .github/workflows may require GitHub workflow scope.

actions.name: delete_repository
actions.description: Delete a GitHub repository by owner and name.

actions.name: get_branch
actions.description: Get a GitHub branch by name.

actions.name: get_commit
actions.description: Get a commit by SHA in a GitHub repository.

actions.name: get_commit_statuses
actions.description: List statuses for a commit reference in reverse chronological order.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Get the current authenticated GitHub user profile.

actions.name: get_file_contents
actions.description: Read a repository file and return both base64 and decoded text when available.

actions.name: get_issue
actions.description: Get a GitHub issue by number.

actions.name: get_latest_release
actions.description: Get the latest published release for a GitHub repository.

actions.name: get_pull_request
actions.description: Get a GitHub pull request by number.

actions.name: get_release
actions.description: Get a GitHub release by numeric id.

actions.name: get_release_by_tag
actions.description: Get a GitHub release by tag name.

actions.name: get_repository
actions.description: Get metadata for a GitHub repository by owner and name.

actions.name: get_workflow_run
actions.description: Get a GitHub workflow run by id.

actions.name: list_authenticated_user_events
actions.description: List activity events for a GitHub user and include private events when the authenticated credential belongs to that user.

actions.name: list_authenticated_user_received_events
actions.description: List received activity events for a GitHub user and include private events when the authenticated credential belongs to that user.

actions.name: list_branches
actions.description: List branches in a GitHub repository.

actions.name: list_check_runs_for_ref
actions.description: List GitHub check runs for a commit SHA, branch, or tag.

actions.name: list_commits
actions.description: List commits in a GitHub repository with optional branch, path, author, and date filters.

actions.name: list_directory_contents
actions.description: List entries under a repository directory path. Empty path means repository root.

actions.name: list_issue_comments
actions.description: List comments under a GitHub issue.

actions.name: list_issue_events
actions.description: List events for a GitHub issue.

actions.name: list_issue_labels
actions.description: List labels applied to a GitHub issue.

actions.name: list_issue_timeline_events
actions.description: List timeline events for a GitHub issue.

actions.name: list_my_repositories
actions.description: List repositories visible to the authenticated GitHub user.

actions.name: list_public_events
actions.description: List the global public GitHub event feed.

actions.name: list_pull_request_commits
actions.description: List commits on a GitHub pull request.

actions.name: list_pull_request_files
actions.description: List files changed in a GitHub pull request.

actions.name: list_pull_request_requested_reviewers
actions.description: List requested reviewers on a GitHub pull request.

actions.name: list_pull_request_review_comments
actions.description: List review comments on a GitHub pull request.

actions.name: list_pull_request_reviews
actions.description: List reviews for a GitHub pull request.

actions.name: list_pull_requests
actions.description: List pull requests for a GitHub repository.

actions.name: list_pull_requests_associated_with_commit
actions.description: List pull requests associated with a commit SHA.

actions.name: list_release_assets
actions.description: List assets attached to a GitHub release.

actions.name: list_releases
actions.description: List releases for a GitHub repository.

actions.name: list_repository_events
actions.description: List recent GitHub events for a repository.

actions.name: list_repository_issue_events
actions.description: List issue events across a GitHub repository.

actions.name: list_repository_issues
actions.description: List issues for a GitHub repository. Pull requests are filtered out from the response.

actions.name: list_repository_labels
actions.description: List labels available in a GitHub repository.

actions.name: list_repository_workflows
actions.description: List workflows configured in a GitHub repository.

actions.name: list_user_public_events
actions.description: List public GitHub events performed by a user.

actions.name: list_user_received_public_events
actions.description: List public GitHub events received by a user.

actions.name: list_workflow_run_jobs
actions.description: List jobs for a GitHub workflow run.

actions.name: list_workflow_runs
actions.description: List GitHub workflow runs for a repository.

actions.name: lock_issue
actions.description: Lock a GitHub issue conversation.

actions.name: merge_branch
actions.description: Merge one branch into another in a GitHub repository.

actions.name: merge_pull_request
actions.description: Merge a GitHub pull request.

actions.name: remove_issue_assignees
actions.description: Remove assignees from a GitHub issue.

actions.name: remove_issue_label
actions.description: Remove one label from a GitHub issue.

actions.name: remove_pull_request_reviewers
actions.description: Remove requested reviewers from a GitHub pull request.

actions.name: rename_branch
actions.description: Rename a branch in a GitHub repository.

actions.name: reply_pull_request_review_comment
actions.description: Reply to a top-level GitHub pull request review comment.

actions.name: request_pull_request_reviewers
actions.description: Request reviewers on a GitHub pull request.

actions.name: rerequest_check_run
actions.description: Re-request a GitHub check run.

actions.name: rerequest_check_suite
actions.description: Re-request a GitHub check suite.

actions.name: rerun_workflow
actions.description: Re-run a GitHub Actions workflow run.

actions.name: search_code
actions.description: Search GitHub code with GitHub search syntax.

actions.name: search_commits
actions.description: Search GitHub commits by commit-message text and qualifiers.

actions.name: search_issues_and_pull_requests
actions.description: Search GitHub issues and pull requests with raw GitHub search syntax or structured filters close to Composio pull-request search.

actions.name: search_labels
actions.description: Search labels within a GitHub repository by repository id and query.

actions.name: search_repositories
actions.description: Search GitHub repositories with GitHub search syntax.

actions.name: search_topics
actions.description: Search GitHub topics with GitHub search syntax.

actions.name: search_users
actions.description: Search GitHub users with GitHub search syntax.

actions.name: set_issue_labels
actions.description: Replace all labels on a GitHub issue.

actions.name: submit_pull_request_review
actions.description: Submit a pending GitHub pull request review.

actions.name: sync_fork_branch_with_upstream
actions.description: Sync a fork branch with its upstream branch.

actions.name: unlock_issue
actions.description: Unlock a GitHub issue conversation.

actions.name: update_issue
actions.description: Update a GitHub issue by number.

actions.name: update_pull_request
actions.description: Update a GitHub pull request title, body, state, base branch, or maintainer-can-modify flag.

actions.name: update_pull_request_branch
actions.description: Update a GitHub pull request branch with the latest base branch changes.
